channel.title: Gopherjs on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Gopherjs on Arrans github.io

item.title: hexops/vecty
item.description: Vecty lets you build responsive and dynamic web frontends in Go using WebAssembly, competing with modern web frameworks like React & VueJS.

item.title: goplusjs/gopherjs
item.description: A compiler from Go to JavaScript

item.title: bep/gr
item.description: Aka Go React: GopherJS bindings for Facebook React. NOTE: Still early and not production ready.
